title: Rcarroll
compiled_truth: Rcarroll is an external contact at [Bracewell & Patterson](companies/bracewell). Over the corpus period (2000-03-01 to 2001-11-27), Rcarroll sent 116 and received 282 emails, totalling 398 interactions. Top correspondents: [Smara](people/smara) (92), [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (74), [Mary Hain](people/mary-hain) (68), [Jsteffe](people/jsteffe) (66), [Acomnes](people/acomnes) (60).
